name: icon-button
visual_summary: The icon-button component is a base component that allows users to render an icon or a collection of icons inside a button. It typically consists of an icon and a background, with the possibility of customizing the component's background and hover color based on a specific design system or theme.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: icon-button
Description: The icon-button component is a base component that allows users to render an icon or a collection of icons inside a button. It typically consists of an icon and a background, with the possibility of customizing the component's background and hover color based on a specific design system or theme.
Style: flat, minimal
Interactions: hoverable, clickable
Tags: button, icon

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
